history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: The image shows a hand holding a black handheld camera on a dark fabric surface indoors.

Main Subject:
A black camera is being held in a person’s hand, with the left side of the camera facing the viewer. The camera body has textured grip areas, a prominent top control section with buttons and a small light, and a label on the side that reads “XCD 45mm.” The person’s hand wraps around the front/bottom portion of the camera body.

Setting:
The scene appears indoors, with the camera and hand resting above a purple fabric surface. The background includes a dark horizontal edge near the top of the frame and a mostly dim, indoor lighting setup.

Visual Details:
The lighting is dim and focused, creating strong shadows on the camera’s body and the hand. The camera’s casing is mostly matte black with metallic gray accents. A textured grip area is visible on the right side of the camera. The purple fabric under the camera has a slightly wrinkled, soft appearance. The camera is angled toward the viewer, and the person’s hand is positioned underneath and around it.

Visible Text:
XCD 45mm
HASSELBLAD

Practical Summary:
A hand holds a black camera resting against a purple fabric surface. The camera shows a side label and top controls, with the lighting making the buttons and grip details stand out.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

[No readable text found in the screenshot.]

# Structured Version

- [No visible/legible text detected.]

# Notes

- The image appears to show a handheld device/camera, but any markings/text on the device are too unclear to extract reliably. Markings may include brand/model text, but it is not legible at this resolution.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.

```json
{
  "nsfw": false,
  "confidence": 0,
  "label": "safe"
}
```
Gambar tersebut menampilkan tangan yang sedang memegang sebuah kamera digital hitam. Kamera tersebut memiliki lensa yang terlihat jelas dengan tulisan "XCD 45mm P" di bagian sisinya. Di bagian atas kamera terdapat beberapa tombol dan roda putar, termasuk tombol oranye yang menonjol. Layar LCD di bagian belakang kamera terlihat, dan ada tulisan "HASSELBLAD" di sana. Latar belakang gambar adalah permukaan yang terbuat dari kain berwarna ungu tua dan sebuah elemen kayu berwarna coklat di bagian atas. Tidak ada konten yang tidak pantas atau vulgar dalam gambar ini.
